instruction: how do I track my order?
response: You can track your order anytime from the 'My Orders' section of your account. Open the order in question and select 'Track shipment' to see its current status and estimated delivery date. If you have your order number {{Order Number}} handy, I can also look it up for you right now.

instruction: I want to cancel my order
response: I can help you cancel that. If your order has not shipped yet, go to 'My Orders', select the order, and choose 'Cancel order'. Once it ships, cancellation is no longer possible, but you can refuse delivery or start a return instead. Would you like me to check the current status of order {{Order Number}}?

instruction: where is my refund?
response: I understand waiting on a refund is frustrating. Once a return is received and inspected, refunds are issued to your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days. If it has been longer than that since you received your return confirmation, please share your order number {{Order Number}} and I will escalate it for you.

instruction: how can I change my shipping address?
response: You can update your shipping address before an order ships from 'My Orders' by selecting 'Edit address'. For future orders, update the default address under Account Settings > Addresses. If the order has already shipped, the address can no longer be changed, but I can help you reroute it with the carrier in some cases.

instruction: i need to reset my password
response: No problem. Go to the login page and select 'Forgot password', then enter the email associated with your account. We will email you a secure reset link that is valid for 30 minutes. If it does not arrive within a few minutes, please check your spam folder.

instruction: what payment methods do you accept?
response: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover, as well as PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All payments are processed securely. Let me know if you run into any trouble at checkout and I will be glad to help.

instruction: how do I return an item?
response: To start a return, open 'My Orders', select the item, and choose 'Return item', then pick a reason. We will email you a prepaid shipping label. Items can be returned within 30 days of delivery in their original condition. Once we receive the item, your refund is processed within 5 to 7 business days.

instruction: my package says delivered but I didn't get it
response: I'm sorry to hear that. First, please check around your property and with neighbors, as carriers sometimes leave packages in a safe spot. Also allow 24 hours, since 'delivered' is occasionally scanned early. If it still has not turned up, share your order number {{Order Number}} and I will open an investigation with the carrier and arrange a replacement or refund.

instruction: can I change my email address on file?
response: Yes. Go to Account Settings > Profile, update the email field, and save. For security we will send a confirmation link to the new address; click it to finish the change. Your login will use the new email once confirmed.

instruction: how long does shipping take?
response: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days, and express shipping takes 1 to 2 business days. Delivery times begin once the order is dispatched, which is usually within 24 hours of ordering. You will receive a tracking link by email as soon as your order ships.

instruction: I was charged twice for my order
response: I'm sorry for the worry. Often a duplicate charge is a temporary authorization hold that drops off within 3 to 5 business days rather than a real second charge. If two completed charges remain after that, please share your order number {{Order Number}} and the last four digits of the card, and I will arrange a refund for the duplicate right away.

instruction: do you ship internationally?
response: Yes, we ship to most countries. International delivery typically takes 7 to 14 business days, and any customs duties or import taxes are the responsibility of the recipient. You can see the exact shipping options and costs for your country at checkout once you enter your address.

instruction: how do I delete my account?
response: I can help with that. To permanently delete your account, go to Account Settings > Privacy and select 'Delete account', then confirm. This removes your personal data in line with our privacy policy and cannot be undone. If you would rather keep the account but stop emails, I can update your communication preferences instead.

instruction: the item I received is damaged
response: I'm really sorry your item arrived damaged. Please go to 'My Orders', select the item, and choose 'Report a problem' > 'Damaged', and add a photo if you can. We will send a free replacement or full refund right away, and you will not need to return the damaged item in most cases.

instruction: can I get an invoice for my purchase?
response: Of course. A copy of your invoice is available under 'My Orders' next to each order, via 'Download invoice'. If you need a VAT or business invoice with specific company details, let me know the details and I will have one issued to your email.

instruction: how do I apply a discount code?
response: At checkout, enter your code in the 'Promo code' or 'Discount' field and select 'Apply' before completing payment. The discount will appear in your order summary. If a code is rejected, it may be expired or have minimum-spend conditions; share the code and I will check it for you.

instruction: I forgot which email I used to sign up
response: No worries. Try the email addresses you use most often on the 'Forgot password' page; you will only get a reset email if an account exists for that address. If none work, contact us with your full name and any order number, and we will help locate your account securely.

instruction: my order is late
response: I'm sorry your order is taking longer than expected. Delivery estimates can slip due to carrier delays or weather. Please check the latest tracking from 'My Orders' first. If the estimated date has clearly passed, share your order number {{Order Number}} and I will chase the carrier and look into a refund of your shipping fee.

instruction: how do I update my payment method?
response: Go to Account Settings > Payment methods to add a new card or remove an old one. To change the card on an existing unshipped order, you may need to cancel and re-place it, since payment is captured at dispatch. I'm happy to walk you through it.

instruction: can I order by phone?
response: We are primarily an online store, so orders are placed through the website or app for security and accuracy. If you are having trouble checking out, I can stay with you here and help resolve the issue so you can complete your order online.

instruction: what is your return policy?
response: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, as long as they are unused and in their original packaging. Some items such as personalized goods and final-sale products are non-returnable; that is noted on the product page. Return shipping is free with the prepaid label we provide.

instruction: how do I check my order status?
response: Open 'My Orders' in your account and the status is shown next to each order: Processing, Shipped, Out for delivery, or Delivered. Selecting an order shows full tracking details. If anything looks off, give me your order number {{Order Number}} and I will take a closer look.

instruction: I entered the wrong shipping address
response: Let's fix that quickly. If the order has not shipped, go to 'My Orders' > 'Edit address' and correct it. If it has already shipped, tell me your order number {{Order Number}} and the correct address, and I will try to reroute it with the carrier before it is delivered.

instruction: do you offer free shipping?
response: Yes, we offer free standard shipping on orders over $50. Below that threshold a flat standard shipping rate applies, which you can see at checkout. Express shipping is available for an additional fee regardless of order total.

instruction: how do I contact customer support?
response: You have reached customer support and I'm glad to help right here. You can also email support@example.com or use the live chat in the app from 8am to 8pm, Monday to Saturday. For urgent order issues, having your order number {{Order Number}} ready helps us resolve things faster.

instruction: can I exchange an item for a different size?
response: Yes. The simplest way is to start a return for the item you have and place a new order for the size you want, so you get the correct size as quickly as possible. If you would like, I can confirm the size you need is in stock before you begin the return.

instruction: why was my payment declined?
response: Payments are usually declined for one of a few reasons: incorrect card details, insufficient funds, an expired card, or your bank flagging the transaction. Please double-check the card number, expiry, and billing address, and try again. If it keeps failing, contacting your bank or trying another payment method usually resolves it.

instruction: how do I cancel my subscription?
response: You can cancel anytime under Account Settings > Subscriptions by selecting 'Cancel subscription'. Your benefits continue until the end of the current billing period, and you will not be charged again. If something prompted you to cancel, I'd be happy to help with that instead.

instruction: I want a refund for a defective product
response: I'm sorry the product is defective. Please open 'My Orders', select the item, and choose 'Report a problem' > 'Defective'. You are entitled to a free replacement or a full refund. Once approved, refunds reach your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days, and a photo of the defect helps us process it faster.

instruction: is my personal information secure?
response: Yes. We protect your data with industry-standard encryption in transit and at rest, and we never sell your personal information. You can review or download your data, and request deletion, anytime under Account Settings > Privacy. Let me know if you have a specific concern.

instruction: how do I create an account?
response: Select 'Sign up' at the top of the site or app, enter your email and a password, and confirm your email through the link we send. Creating an account lets you track orders, save addresses, and check out faster. It only takes a minute.

instruction: can I add an item to an order I already placed?
response: Orders cannot be edited to add items once they are placed, because they move quickly into fulfillment. The easiest option is to place a separate order for the additional item. If both orders have not shipped, contact me and I will see whether they can be combined into one shipment to save on delivery.

instruction: my discount code isn't working
response: I'm sorry for the hassle. Codes can fail if they are expired, case-sensitive, already used, or below the minimum order value. Please re-enter it exactly as written with no spaces. If it still will not apply, share the code with me and I will check its status and conditions for you.

instruction: when will an out of stock item be back?
response: Restock timing varies by item. On the product page you can select 'Notify me' to get an email the moment it is back in stock. If you tell me the product name, I will check whether we have an expected restock date for it.

instruction: how do I change the quantity in my cart?
response: In your cart, use the quantity selector next to the item to increase or decrease the amount, and the total updates automatically. To remove an item entirely, set the quantity to zero or select 'Remove'. Your cart is saved to your account so you can return to it later.

instruction: do you have a loyalty program?
response: Yes. Our rewards program earns you points on every purchase that you can redeem for discounts on future orders. You can join for free and view your points balance under Account Settings > Rewards. Let me know if you would like help enrolling.

instruction: I received the wrong item
response: I'm sorry we sent the wrong item. Please go to 'My Orders', select the order, and choose 'Report a problem' > 'Wrong item received'. We will ship the correct item right away and provide a free return label for the incorrect one. Sharing your order number {{Order Number}} will speed this up.

instruction: can I use more than one discount code?
response: Only one discount code can be applied per order. If you have several, choose the one that gives you the best savings on your basket. Reward points, where eligible, can usually be combined with a code, and the totals will be shown clearly before you pay.

instruction: how do I see my order history?
response: Your full order history is in the 'My Orders' section of your account, listed from newest to oldest with status, items, and totals. Selecting any order shows its details, tracking, and invoice. Let me know if you are looking for a specific past order.

instruction: what happens if I'm not home for delivery
response: If you are not home, most carriers will leave the package in a safe place, attempt redelivery the next business day, or hold it at a nearby pickup point. The tracking page will tell you which option applies and let you choose a preference. You can also add delivery instructions at checkout.

instruction: how do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
response: You can unsubscribe at any time using the 'Unsubscribe' link at the bottom of any marketing email, or by turning off promotional emails under Account Settings > Communication preferences. You will still receive essential emails about your orders and account.

instruction: is there a warranty on products?
response: Many products come with a manufacturer warranty, and the length is listed on the product page. On top of that, our 30-day return policy covers defects and issues after delivery. If a product fails under warranty, share your order number {{Order Number}} and I will help you start a warranty claim.

instruction: can I schedule a delivery date?
response: For most items you can select a preferred delivery date or time window at checkout where the carrier supports it. After dispatch, you can also reschedule directly from the carrier's tracking page. Let me know your order number {{Order Number}} and I will check the options available for your delivery.

instruction: how do I redeem my reward points?
response: At checkout, you will see your available reward points with an option to apply them to your order total. Select 'Redeem points' and the discount is deducted before payment. You can view your current balance anytime under Account Settings > Rewards.

instruction: my refund amount is less than expected
response: I'm sorry for the confusion. Refunds can be lower than the purchase price if a discount was applied at order time, if shipping fees are non-refundable, or if a restocking fee applies to certain items. Share your order number {{Order Number}} and I will break down exactly how your refund was calculated.

instruction: can I pick up my order in store?
response: Where in-store pickup is available, you can select it at checkout and we will email you when your order is ready to collect, usually within a few hours. Bring your order confirmation and a photo ID to the pickup desk. Let me know your area and I will check whether pickup is offered near you.

instruction: how do I leave a review for a product?
response: Once your order is delivered, you can leave a review from the product page or from the link in your delivery confirmation email. Select a star rating and add your comments. Reviews from verified purchases help other customers, and we read them closely.

instruction: what is the status of my return?
response: You can follow your return under 'My Orders' > the relevant order > 'Return status', which shows when the label was used, when we received the item, and when the refund was issued. If it shows received but no refund after 7 business days, give me your order number {{Order Number}} and I will look into it.

instruction: can someone else pick up or receive my order?
response: Yes. Anyone at the delivery address can receive the package, and for pickup orders you can authorize another person by adding their name in the order notes; they will need the order confirmation and a photo ID. Let me know if you would like me to add an authorized recipient to order {{Order Number}}.

instruction: do you price match?
response: We offer price matching on identical in-stock items sold by approved retailers. If you find a lower price within 14 days of your purchase, share the link and your order number {{Order Number}} and I will review it; if it qualifies, we will refund the difference to your original payment method.
